notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Activity that needs your attention.
notifications.empty_hint: You're all caught up! We'll let you know when there's activity.

toasts.failed_mark_read: Failed to mark notification as read
toasts.failed_mark_all_read: Failed to mark notifications as read

layout.title: Settings
layout.subtitle: Everything in one place — your account and your workspace. Pick a section to manage it.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.

avatar.hint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
avatar.err_type_desc: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.

form.email_pending_3: — both need to confirm before the change takes effect.

toasts.saved_check_email: Profile saved — check your email to confirm the address change

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsapp.description: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.

toasts.req_token: Access Token is required for initial setup
toasts.reenter_token: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
toasts.save_reg_failed: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number: {{error}}
toasts.save_reg_skipped: Credentials saved and verified. Inbound registration was skipped (no PIN) — see Registration status below.
toasts.save_success: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
toasts.test_error: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
toasts.verify_success: Number is fully wired — Meta is delivering events.
toasts.verify_failed: Number is not fully registered. See the checks below for which step failed.
toasts.verify_error: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
toasts.reset_confirm: This will delete the current WhatsApp config so you can re-enter it. Continue?
toasts.reset_success: Configuration cleared. You can now re-enter your credentials.
toasts.sdk_not_loaded: Facebook SDK not loaded yet. Please wait a moment.
toasts.fb_cancelled: User cancelled login or did not fully authorize.

connection.desc_valid: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
connection.desc_invalid: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.

registration.title_live: Registered — Meta will deliver events to wacrm
registration.title_not_live: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
registration.desc_failed_2: . Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
registration.desc_skipped: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.

embedded.title: Connect with Meta
embedded.description: The easiest and official way to connect your WhatsApp Business account.
embedded.hint: By clicking this button, you will be prompted to select your WhatsApp Business Account and Phone Number.

manual.title: Advanced: Manual Configuration
manual.token_hint: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
manual.verify_hint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
manual.pin_hint_6: Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp Accounts → Phone Numbers → Two-step verification
manual.pin_hint_7: , then paste it here so wacrm can subscribe the number — otherwise Meta routes inbound events to whichever app last claimed it (the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA).
manual.pin_hint_9: have no PIN and are pre-registered — leave this blank for them. Leaving it blank also keeps an existing registration untouched.

webhook.title: Webhook Configuration
webhook.description: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.
webhook.label: Webhook Callback URL

members.title: Team members
members.description: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
members.invite_warning: The plaintext invite URL is only shown once at creation for security — to re-share, revoke the invite below and create a new one.
members.no_invites_help_3: above to generate a shareable link.
members.remove_desc_2: from the account? They'll be signed out of this account and given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't deleted.

security.title: Login & security
security.description: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.

password.title: Password
password.description: Use at least {{minPassword}} characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
password.error_no_email: Cannot change password without a current email
password.error_too_short: Password must be at least {{minPassword}} characters
password.error_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Sign out of every device where you're logged in — including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
sessions.dialog_description: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.description: Keys authenticate the public REST API so you can build your own automations.
api_keys.create_hint: Click New API key to create one.
api_keys.ask_admin: Ask an admin to create one.

toasts.copy_failed: Copy failed — select and copy manually

dialog.copy_desc: This is the only time the full key is shown. Store it somewhere safe — if you lose it, revoke it and create a new one.
dialog.new_desc: Name it after the integration that will use it, and grant only the scopes it needs.
dialog.scopes_hint: A key with no scopes can still call GET /api/v1/me to verify it works.

login.title: Welcome back
login.desc_invite: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.

signup.title: Create account
signup.desc_invite: Verify your email, then accept the invitation to join your team.
signup.check_email_desc_1: We've sent a confirmation link to
signup.check_email_desc_2: . Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
signup.err_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.success_desc: If an account exists with that email, we sent a password reset link.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Manage your contact list.

custom_fields.title: Custom fields
custom_fields.description: Define extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the "Update Contact Field" automation action.
custom_fields.create_error: Could not create field. You may not have permission.
custom_fields.confirm_delete: Delete "{{name}}"? This also removes its stored value on every contact. This cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Contacts
import.description: Upload a CSV file with a required <0>phone</0> column. Optional: <1>name</1>, <2>email</2>, <3>company</3>, <4>tags</4> (comma-separated; quote multi-tag cells).
import.click_to_choose: Click to choose a CSV file
import.invalid_csv: No valid rows found. Ensure CSV has a "phone" column header.

contacts.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
contacts.select_all: Select all contacts on this page

delete_dialog.title: Delete Contact
delete_dialog.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
delete_dialog.confirm_plural: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} contacts? This action cannot be undone.

form.add_desc: Fill in the details to create a new contact.
form.name: Name
form.duplicate_phone: A contact with this phone number already exists
form.duplicate_similar: A contact with a very similar number already exists.
form.phone_hint: Include country code, e.g. +1 for US
form.no_tags: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.

detail.name: Name
detail.tags_hint: Click a tag to add or remove it from this contact.
detail.no_tags: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.
detail.no_custom: No custom fields defined. Create them in Settings.

pipelines.title: Pipelines
pipelines.default_stages_hint: Default stages (New Lead → Won) will be created automatically.
pipelines.empty_desc: Create a pipeline to start tracking deals

analytics.tooltip_total_deals: Count of every deal in this pipeline that isn't marked as Lost. Won deals are still included.
analytics.tooltip_pipeline_value: Sum of the dollar values of all deals in this pipeline, excluding deals marked as Lost.
analytics.tooltip_avg_deal_size: Pipeline Value divided by Total Deals — the average value of a single non-lost deal.
analytics.tooltip_weighted_value: Expected revenue: each open deal's value × its stage probability. First stage ≈ 10%, stages progress up to 90%, Won = 100%. Lost deals are excluded.
analytics.tooltip_won_this_month: Deals marked as Won since the first day of the current month.
analytics.tooltip_lost_this_month: Deals marked as Lost since the first day of the current month.

settings.title: Manage Pipeline
settings.delete_confirm_desc: This will archive all deals in this pipeline. This cannot be undone.

toasts.required_fields: Title, contact, and stage are required
toasts.stage_has_deals: Move or delete deals in this stage first
toasts.not_linked: Your profile is not linked to an account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live analytics across conversations, contacts, deals, broadcasts, and automations.

conversations_chart.title: Conversations Over Time
conversations_chart.subtitle: Daily message volume by direction
conversations_chart.empty_title: No message activity in this range
conversations_chart.empty_hint: Send or receive messages to start populating this chart.

pipeline_donut.title: Pipeline Value
pipeline_donut.subtitle: Open deals by stage
pipeline_donut.empty_hint: Create deals in Pipelines to see stage breakdowns here.

response_time_chart.title: Average First Response Time
response_time_chart.subtitle: Minutes to reply to a customer's first unreplied message, by weekday
response_time_chart.empty_hint: This chart fills in as you reply to customer messages.

activity_feed.title: Recent Activity
activity_feed.empty_hint: Activity from messages, deals, broadcasts, and automations will appear here.

inbox.whatsapp_not_connected: WhatsApp® is not connected. Go to Settings to connect your account.

empty_selection.title: Select a conversation
empty_selection.subtitle: Choose a conversation from the left to start messaging

empty_messages.title: No messages yet
empty_messages.subtitle: Send a template to start the conversation

errors.wait_sending: Wait for the message to finish sending

errors.ai_not_setup: AI isn't set up yet — enable it in Settings → AI Assistant.
errors.no_reply: The assistant didn't return a reply.
errors.file_too_large: File is {{actual}} MB — {{kind}} limit is {{limit}} MB.
errors.voice_not_supported: Voice recording isn't supported in this browser.

composer.session_expired_banner: 24-hour session expired. Use a template to re-engage.
composer.readonly_tooltip: Read-only — your role can't send messages

placeholders.readonly: Read-only — viewers can browse but not reply
placeholders.type_message: Type a message... (Shift+Enter for new line)

composer.ai_hint: Tap the ✨ to draft a reply with AI — you can edit it before sending

template_picker.desc_fill: Fill in the placeholders to render this template. Meta requires every variable to be set.
template_picker.desc_pick: Pick an approved WhatsApp template to send to this contact.
template_picker.no_templates_desc: Approve a template in Meta WhatsApp Manager, then sync it from Settings → Templates.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.description: Send bulk messages to your contacts using approved templates.
broadcasts.no_broadcasts_desc: Create your first broadcast to reach your contacts at scale.

new.title: New Broadcast
new.description: Create and send a broadcast message to your contacts.

toasts.missing_name: Give the broadcast a name before saving a draft.
toasts.not_linked: Your profile is not linked to an account.

step1.title: Choose a Template
step1.description: Select an approved message template for your broadcast.
step1.create_first: Create a template in Settings first.

step2.title: Select Audience
step2.description: Choose who will receive this broadcast.

all.label: All Contacts
all.desc: Send to every contact in your database

custom_field.label: Custom Field
custom_field.desc: Filter by a custom field value

csv.label: Upload CSV
csv.desc: Upload a list of phone numbers

tags.not_found: No tags found. Create tags in Settings.

custom_field.title: Custom Field Filter
custom_field.no_defined: No custom fields defined. Create one in Settings → Custom Fields.

summary.title: Audience Summary
summary.select_type: Select an audience type to see the estimate.

step3.title: Personalize Message
step3.description: Map template variables to contact fields, custom fields, or static values.
step3.media_desc_2: sent as the message header. Used for every recipient in this broadcast.
step3.media_missing: A media URL is required to send this template.
step3.no_variables: This template has no variables to personalize.
step3.missing_map_1: Map every placeholder before continuing — still missing
step3.missing_map_2: . Otherwise those placeholders will ship to Meta as empty strings.

step4.title: Review & Send
step4.description: Name your broadcast, review the details, and send.
step4.confirm_desc_1: You are about to send this broadcast to
step4.confirm_desc_3: template. This action cannot be undone.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Build workflows that react to WhatsApp® events automatically.
automations.pick_template: Pick a template above or create one from scratch.
automations.delete_desc_2: and its execution history. This cannot be undone.

welcome_message.name: Welcome Message
welcome_message.description: Auto-reply to first-time contacts with a greeting.

out_of_office.name: Out of Office
out_of_office.description: Auto-reply during off-hours so nobody is left waiting.

lead_qualifier.name: Lead Qualifier
lead_qualifier.description: Ask qualification questions to filter inbound leads.

follow_up_reminder.name: Follow-up Reminder
follow_up_reminder.description: Send a nudge if a contact has not replied within 24 hours.

flows.title: Flows
flows.description: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversations. Useful for menus, FAQs, and triage before a human steps in.
flows.empty_desc: Build your first conversation — a welcome menu, an order lookup, an FAQ bot. Customers tap buttons; the bot routes them to the right answer (or the right agent).
flows.create_desc: Start from a template or build from scratch.
flows.delete_confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Any active runs will end immediately.
flows.trigger_first_message: Triggers on a contact's first-ever inbound message

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: Your bring-your-own-key AI agent — set it up, then test it in the playground before it replies to customers in the inbox.
agents.setup_desc: Bring your own OpenAI or Anthropic key. wacrm calls the provider directly with your key — no per-seat AI fees, and your data stays yours. This powers AI-drafted replies in the inbox, the auto-reply bot, and the Playground.
agents.admin_only: Only admins and owners can change the AI configuration.
agents.encrypted_desc: Your key is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and never shown again after saving.
agents.embeddings_desc_1: An OpenAI key used only to embed your knowledge base (text-embedding-3-small)
agents.embeddings_desc_2: — can be the same key as above
agents.embeddings_desc_3: . Leave blank to use keyword search instead. Clear it to turn semantic search off.
agents.behaviour_desc: Tell the assistant about your business — products, tone, what it may and may not promise. This context feeds both drafts and auto-replies.
agents.business_placeholder: e.g. We are Acme, a coffee-equipment store. Be warm and concise. Never quote prices or delivery dates — hand off to a human for those.
agents.enable_ai_desc: Master switch. Turns on the “Draft with AI” button in the inbox.
agents.auto_reply_desc: The bot answers new inbound messages automatically (only when no flow handles them and no agent is assigned). Hands off to a human when it can’t help.
agents.max_replies_desc: After this many bot replies in one thread, the bot goes quiet.
agents.playground_subtitle: — test replies as if you were a customer
agents.playground_empty_1: Send a message to see how your agent would reply.
agents.playground_empty_2: It uses your knowledge base and behaves exactly like the auto-reply bot — including handoff.
agents.playground_go_setup: Not set up yet? Go to Setup
agents.playground_handoff: Would hand off to a human here
agents.playground_err_setup: No agent configured yet — finish Setup first.
agents.provider_encrypted: Your key is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and never shown again after saving.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.desc_main: Add FAQs, policies, or product details. The assistant retrieves the relevant pieces when drafting and auto-replying, so it can answer instead of handing off.
knowledge.desc_semantic_on: Semantic search is on (embeddings key set).
knowledge.desc_semantic_off: Using keyword search — add an embeddings key above for semantic search.
knowledge.doc_content_placeholder: Paste the FAQ answer, policy text, or product details…
knowledge.reindex_tooltip: Re-embed all documents (e.g. after adding an embeddings key)
